title: Grumpy Bookstore Owner
hints: Start by counting satisfied customers when the owner is never grumpy. This baseline is always included in the final answer.
Focus only on minutes where the owner is grumpy. The extra satisfied customers come from choosing the best window of length X to flip these grumpy minutes.
Use a sliding window to find the maximum sum of customers in any consecutive X minutes where grumpy[i] is 1. Add this max sum to your baseline.
